journeys.name: Platform Policy And No-Advice Baseline
journeys.overclaimRisk: Viewer may assume policy and security settings were persisted by domain-specific handlers.
journeys.caveat: This is a policy frame; dedicated j10.* handlers are required before claiming policy/security persistence.
journeys.captionShort: AlphaVest starts with a no-unapproved-advice policy frame.
journeys.captionLong: Platform policies frame the demo: advisor approval alone never releases advice to the client.
presenterNotes: Use this as narrative setup, not policy persistence proof.
journeys.endState: No-advice, evidence and redaction policies are framed before workflow starts.
preconditions: Demo session mode is active
No real customer data is used
This is a policy frame; dedicated j10.* handlers are required before claiming policy/security persistence.
visibilityRules: No unapproved advice reaches the client
Client visibility is controlled by compliance and route-specific caveats
complianceRules: Advisor approval alone is not enough

journeys.name: Advisor Approval Without Client Release

presenterNotes: This is the strongest rule to repeat in sales demos.
journeys.endState: Advisor approval is saved; client release remains blocked.

journeys.endState: Release is blocked until evidence is complete.

steps.title: Export Preview: Inspect approval modal state
steps.caption: The export is reviewed before download or sharing. Scope and redaction keep sensitive client data from being shared too broadly.

steps.expectedStateChange: Target state generated if gates pass
steps.qaAssertion: Approval is explicit, not implicit.
steps.title: Export Preview: Click Confirm Approval and Export
steps.caption: The export is reviewed before download or sharing. Scope and redaction keep sensitive client data from being shared too broadly.

steps.qaAssertion: Timeline includes watermark and download recorded.
steps.title: Export Download: Click Download
steps.caption: The package is prepared for download only after review. Scope, redaction and evidence keep the shared material controlled.

steps.qaAssertion: External sharing has expiry.
steps.title: Export Download: Click share/create link if exposed
steps.caption: The package is prepared for download only after review. Scope, redaction and evidence keep the shared material controlled.

journeys.name: Governance Access And Audit
journeys.overclaimRisk: Viewer may assume production authorization is complete.
journeys.caveat: Governance actions are demo authorization proof; real auth remains out of scope.
journeys.captionShort: Access changes are scoped, confirmed and audited.
journeys.captionLong: Governance clips show invite, role confirmation, access approval and controlled audit export.
journeys.endState: Access and audit controls are visible and scoped.
preconditions: Demo session mode is active
No real customer data is used
Governance actions are demo authorization proof; real auth remains out of scope.
visibilityRules: No unapproved advice reaches the client
Client visibility is controlled by compliance and route-specific caveats
complianceRules: Advisor approval alone is not enough
Compliance release controls client visibility when advice-like content is involved
riskNotes: Viewer may assume production authorization is complete.
Governance actions are demo authorization proof; real auth remains out of scope.

steps.qaAssertion: Pending/blocked/revoked users visible.
steps.title: Governance Users: Click Invite User
steps.caption: A new user is invited with a defined role. Sensitive access changes need a clear record so they can be reviewed later.

steps.qaAssertion: Invitation is scoped, not broad access.
steps.title: Governance Users: Click Send Invitation
steps.caption: A new user is invited with a defined role. Sensitive access changes need a clear record so they can be reviewed later.

steps.qaAssertion: Sensitive permission confirmation visible.
steps.title: Role Management: Click Save Changes
steps.caption: A role or access change is reviewed with clear scope. Sensitive permission changes need a record so they can be checked later.

steps.qaAssertion: SOD conflict shows review required.
steps.title: Access Requests: Inspect request drawer
steps.caption: A role or access change is reviewed with clear scope. Sensitive permission changes need a record so they can be checked later.

steps.qaAssertion: Policy checks shown before decision.
steps.title: Access Requests: Click Approve
steps.caption: A role or access change is reviewed with clear scope. Sensitive permission changes need a record so they can be checked later.

steps.action: Open audit history and inspect event drawer
steps.qaAssertion: Lineage includes request, policy, approval and grant.
steps.title: Access Audit History: Open audit history and inspect event drawer
steps.caption: A role or access change is reviewed with clear scope. Sensitive permission changes need a record so they can be checked later.

steps.qaAssertion: Audit export cannot bypass export controls.
steps.title: Access Audit History: Click Export events if exposed
steps.caption: A role or access change is reviewed with clear scope. Sensitive permission changes need a record so they can be checked later.
